searchDocs.title: redeeem​
searchDocs.content: </> CodeServiceClient:redeeem(code: string) → ( boolean, string ) Sends a promotional code redemption request to the server and returns a success status along with a user-friendly status/error message. local CodeService = require(path.to.CodeService).client local result = CodeService:redeem("Update1") print(result)

searchDocs.title: Code​
searchDocs.content: </> interface Code { reward: string | {string}-- The reward identifier(s) (as a string or array of strings) to grant on redemption. params: {any} | {{any}} | nil-- Optional parameters passed to the corresponding reward callback(s). userIds: {number}?-- Optional array of specific Roblox User IDs permitted to redeem this code. active: boolean-- Whether the code is active and eligible for redemption. expiration: number?-- Optional Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch) after which the code is expired. uses: number?-- Optional maximum number of uses remaining for this code. } Represents a promotional code's configuration and status in the DataStore.

searchDocs.title: Codes​
searchDocs.content: </> type Codes = {[string]: Code} A dictionary mapping promotional code names to their configuration structures.

searchDocs.title: InventoryCodes​
searchDocs.content: </> type InventoryCodes = {[string]: boolean} A dictionary mapping code names to booleans, indicating which codes a player has redeemed.

searchDocs.title: RewardCallbacks​
searchDocs.content: </> type RewardCallbacks = {[string]: (...any?) → ()} A dictionary mapping reward identifiers to their execution callback functions.

searchDocs.title: PlayerData​
searchDocs.content: </> type PlayerData = {redeeming: boolean} Temporary session state for each player redeeming a code.

searchDocs.title: init​
searchDocs.content: </> CodeServiceServer:init( rewardCallbacks: RewardCallbacks-- The dictionary of reward callback functions. ) → () Initializes the CodeService server-side, starts the periodic code update loop, and registers the networking channel. local DataService = require(path.to.DataService).server local CodeService = require(path.to.CodeService).server CodeService:init({ money = function(player: Player, amount: number) DataService:update(player, "money", function(money) return money + amount end) end })

searchDocs.title: getActiveCodes​
searchDocs.content: </> CodeServiceServer:getActiveCodes() → () Returns a dictionary of all currently active codes. local CodeService = require(path.to.CodeService).server local activeCodes = CodeService:getActiveCodes()

searchDocs.title: addUserIdsToCode​
searchDocs.content: </> CodeServiceServer:addUserIdsToCode( code: string, userIds: {number} ) → () Appends a list of Roblox User IDs to an existing code's restricted user list. local CodeService = require(path.to.CodeService).server CodeService:addUserIdsToCode("Update1", { 1234567, 7654321 })

searchDocs.title: add​
searchDocs.content: </> CodeServiceServer:add( code: string, info: Code ) → () Registers a new code with the specified configuration and saves it to the DataStore. local CodeService = require(path.to.CodeService).server CodeService:add("Update1", { reward = { "money" }, params = { 1000 }, uses = 500, })

searchDocs.title: remove​
searchDocs.content: </> CodeServiceServer:remove(code: string) → () Deletes a code from the DataStore completely. local CodeService = require(path.to.CodeService).server CodeService:remove("Update1")

searchDocs.title: deactivate​
searchDocs.content: </> CodeServiceServer:deactivate(code: string) → () Marks a code as inactive without deleting its data from the DataStore. local CodeService = require(path.to.CodeService).server CodeService:deactivate("Update1")

searchDocs.title: hasRedeemedCode​
searchDocs.content: </> CodeServiceServer:hasRedeemedCode( player: Player , code: string ) → boolean Checks if a specific player has already redeemed the given code. local CodeService = require(path.to.CodeService).server local alreadyRedeemed = CodeService:hasRedeemedCode(player, "Update1") print(alreadyRedeemed)

searchDocs.title: redeem​
searchDocs.content: </> CodeServiceServer:redeem( player: Player , code: string ) → number Handles a code redemption request from a client. Performs validation, updates player data, and awards rewards. local CodeService = require(path.to.CodeService).server local result = CodeService:redeem(player, "Update1") print(result)
